column1: # All times are WALL time in seconds for the davidson kernel (1 call = all k-points)
# Exercise 2: PW parallelism (cegterg, nd=1, single k-point Si4)
# Parameter: np = number of MPI ranks
# Exercise 3: ScaLAPACK parallelism (pcegterg, np=32, single k-point Si4)
# Parameter: nd = number of diagonalization (ScaLAPACK) processes
# Exercise 4: k-point pool parallelism (np=32, Si4 50 k-points)
# Parameter: nk = number of k-point pools
# davidson_wall_s = wall time per pool (each pool processes 50/nk k-points)
